Comment.value: This script clones a specific Package and all of its Chapters, Pages, Page items, Modifiers, Tags, Texts, Media etc
This script is called from: 1. Clone Title 2. Clone Package group 3. From a button in Package Settings (via script Clone Package CL) 4. From script Start Cloning
Script is designed to work PSOS

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_group_id" ; $new_pkgr_id ) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_sortindex" ; $new_sortindex )
If the whole Title is cloned we need to point to new Blocks, Modifiers, Lists, Links, Score Categories, IOs, Tags etc

Calculation.Text: Case(Not IsEmpty($suffix); TF PK Header::Text & " " & $suffix; TF PK Header::Text )
Case(Not IsEmpty($suffix); FAT Package::Reference name & " " & $suffix; FAT Package::Reference name)
Case ( FAT Package::FC Package directory = "title-information"; "title-information" ; PrettifyDash ( FAT Package::FC Package directory & "-" & FAT Package::Serial ID) )

Comment.value: Moving a package when moving a package group - do nothing - $package_group_id is the NEW package_group_id
Moved single packages should not have a package group even if they had it initially.
Update cloned record with new data

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $new_pk_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "package" ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Package::Header txt id ) ) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $new_pk_id ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName ))

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $new_pk_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "package" ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Package::Sub header 1 txt id ) ) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $new_pk_id ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName ))

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $new_pk_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "package" ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Package::Sub header 2 txt id ) ) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $new_pk_id ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName ))

Comment.value: Check if Link to this item exist. Duplicate Link if $clone_settings include Link

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "old_item_id" ; $old_pk_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_item_id" ; $new_pk_id )

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "old_item_id" ; $old_pk_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_item_id" ; $new_pk_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $new_pk_id )

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_item_id" ; $old_pk_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_item_id" ; $new_pk_id )

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_item_id" ; $old_pk_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_item_id" ; $new_pk_id )

Comment.value: Callers always usde the Alt TO

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "parent_id" ; $new_pk_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_ch_id" ; $old_ch_id )
